title: The Ultimate Product Teardown Framework
summary: A structured approach to deconstructing any product to understand its core loop, UX, and monetization strategy. Includes a sample product discovery framework.

title: Writing an Amazon PR/FAQ
summary: Learn how to work backwards from the customer using the famous Amazon Press Release / FAQ format.
